name: Stuffed Avocados
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the avocados in half and remove the pits.
2. Gently scoop out the insides, leaving the shell intact.
3. Mash the avocado flesh.
4. Add the diced scallions, cucumber chunks, radish pieces, tamari, sea salt, garlic powder, sesame meal, and nutritional yeast to the mashed avocado.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
6. Fill each avocado shell with the mixture.
7. Top each stuffed avocado with sesame meal, nutritional yeast, and sprouts.
